description.value: Aura moderate conjuration; CL 5th; Slot ring; Price 8,700 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION A scholarâs ring grants complete understanding of any written text or spoken language, even one that the wearer has never encountered before (as the comprehend languages spell), as well as a +5 competence bonus on Knowledge (history) checks. In addition, once every 5 days the wearer can invoke a legend lore spell related to a subject that she has been studying in the previous week, if she has attempted a Knowledge (history) check aided by the ring. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Forge Ring; Spells comprehend languages, legend lore; Cost 4,350 gp.
